name: ASUS Prime B650M-A AX AMD B650(Ryzen 7000) Micro-ATX motherboard(DDR5, PCIe 5.0 M.2 support, 2.5Gb Ethernet, Wi-Fi 6, DisplayPort, HDMI ,USB 3.2 Gen 2 ports, front USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-C)
shortName: ASUS Prime B650M-A AX AMD B650(Ryzen 7000) Micro-ATX
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for AMD Ryzen 7000 processors with DDR5 and PCIe 5.0 support, ideal for mid-range gaming and productivity builds.
